footer.built: Designed and built by Efrain Cabrera.

hero.subtitle: I build scalable, AI-first web and mobile products with React, Next.js, Laravel and React Native — focused on real impact in production.

about.label: About
about.p1: Full-Stack developer with 5+ years building scalable, responsive web and mobile products. I work primarily with React, Next.js, Laravel, Nest.js and React Native.
about.p2: I specialize in production AI products: from offline-first healthcare PWAs with LlamaIndex document processing (MediClarity) to multi-tenant gym operations on Supabase (Madbox) and B2B2C mobile platforms with Stripe Connect auto-payouts (Perfect Book). I've shipped across healthcare, beauty, hospitality and construction — leading frontend architecture and designing secure multi-tenant systems with Row-Level Security.
about.p3: I'm passionate about performance optimization, clean UI/UX, and working end-to-end with multidisciplinary teams. I'm currently exploring modern stacks like Bun + TanStack Start + Convex, always with an AI-first approach.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's build something real.
contact.subtitle: I respond within a business day.

perfectBook.problem: Barbers, shop owners and clients had no single platform for bookings, payouts and team management — payments and shifts lived across WhatsApp and spreadsheets.
perfectBook.solution: Built a B2B2C React Native app (iOS + web) on Expo + Supabase with 4 user roles, Stripe Connect auto-payouts, Pago Móvil manual flow and subscription gating.
perfectBook.outcome: Live on the App Store with multi-role experiences, multi-currency wallet (USD + VES) and onboarding for both shops and independent professionals.

madbox.problem: Gym admins juggled multi-currency billing, member status, six payment methods and monthly closures by hand — slow and error-prone.
madbox.solution: Built a Next.js + Supabase platform with RBAC, automated payment follow-up, multi-currency rates (BCV / Binance USDT / custom), WOD scheduling, member portal and immutable monthly snapshots.
madbox.outcome: +95% billing accuracy, −50% admin workload and zero unauthorized access incidents.

mediclarity.problem: Patients struggled to understand fragmented medical records, and providers had no unified view of their care across documents and devices.
mediclarity.solution: Built an offline-first PWA with Supabase Auth + RLS, LlamaIndex document analysis, Realtime collaboration, wearable integration and a chat-based AI health assistant.
mediclarity.outcome: Two role-based experiences (patients + providers) shipped with HIPAA-ready architecture, medication tracking and AI-powered insights.

damasco.problem: Café Damasco needed a public-facing site that reflected its specialty-coffee brand and drove walk-ins.
damasco.solution: Built a Next.js + Tailwind marketing site with menu, location and brand storytelling.
damasco.outcome: Live brand site for the café's day-to-day customer-facing presence.

contractor.problem: Construction teams ran documents, AI extraction and voice agent calls across disconnected tools — no single source of truth for jobs and knowledge.
contractor.solution: Built a Next.js 15 platform on Supabase with OpenAI document extraction, embeddings and retrieval chat, plus Retell voice/chat agent workflows; async jobs run on Upstash QStash with inline fallback.
contractor.outcome: Production-ready ops platform unifying document ingestion, AI knowledge retrieval and voice-agent calls for construction teams.

librarian.problem: A bookstore was running its in-house library by hand — inventory, members and lending were hard to track and audit.
librarian.solution: Built a library management system as a university project covering inventory, member accounts and lending flows.
librarian.outcome: The bookstore reorganized its day-to-day library operations on top of the system.

biocure.problem: bioCure Prime needed a high-conversion landing to drive 15-minute intro-call bookings for their hormone health program.
biocure.solution: Built a marketing site focused on clarity, social proof and a single primary CTA.
biocure.outcome: Live landing driving free intro calls with physicians.

primefx.problem: Prime FX needed an investment platform that automatically computed and distributed daily interest on crypto holdings.
primefx.solution: Implemented financial logic in Laravel with cron jobs processing returns every 24h according to configured rates.
primefx.outcome: Automated daily interest distribution running in production.

billGenerator.problem: Internal billing was fully manual — slow and error-prone.
billGenerator.solution: Built a Next.js + Zustand tool that automated bill generation end-to-end.
billGenerator.outcome: Client adopted it and reported a happier, faster billing workflow.
